Amazon CodeWhisperer (Q Developer)

AI coding companion optimized for AWS development

7/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$19/moStarting Price
2022Founded
Free Plan Available

About Amazon CodeWhisperer (Q Developer)

Amazon CodeWhisperer (Q Developer) is a ai coding platform founded in 2022. It positions itself as “AI coding companion optimized for AWS development” and is best suited for AWS developers, teams already in AWS ecosystem. Pricing starts at $19/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
AutocompleteYes
Code GenerationYes
Code ReviewYes
DebuggingYes
RefactoringYes
Test GenerationNo
Multi LanguageYes
Ide IntegrationYes
ChatYes
DocumentationYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Free tier for individuals
  • Excellent AWS integration
  • Security scanning included
  • Good for IaC and cloud code

Cons

  • Best suited only for AWS stack
  • Autocomplete quality inconsistent
  • Fewer IDE integrations than Copilot
